prompt.content:
Using the Components Tax model, and the assets document in Xero, calculate the Depreciation Adjustment for the years 2021, 2022 and 2023.

Assumptions:
- As your depreciation cost basis use registered values from the assets document only and group them by purchase year.
- For the book SL method assume a fixed UL of 6 years to all assets in 2021, 5 years to all assets in 2022, and 7 years to all assets in 2023
- For tax, use the recovery period mapped to each acquisition's year in the Components Tax model. Apply one class per year group and if multiple classes exist for a year, use the shorter recovery period.

Present output in $, rounded to two decimal places.

messages.content: States 2021 Depreciation Adjustment is $161,240.27 (acceptable ranges would be $161,241.27 and $161,239.27).
